hero.headline: JAIN Online MBA in AI for Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) Online MBA with an AI for Marketing specialisation. NIRF #62 University, NAAC A++, UGC-DEB approved. AI for Business Decision Making, Strategic Management in the AI Era, AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection, AI-Enabled Leadership, Predictive Financial Modelling for Business Decisions, and Emerging Tech in Business in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: JAIN Online MBA AI for Marketing: NIRF #62, NAAC A++, fees Rs 1.75L-1.96L (3 payment options), 4 scholarship categories. AI-marketing convergence curriculum with GenAI tools, Strategic AI for marketing decision-making, AI-Enabled Leadership, Emerging Tech applications, and Predictive Modelling. Strongest JAIN marketing spec for AI-forward digital marketing, growth, and brand strategy roles.

about.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Marketing is offered by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University), Bengaluru. JAIN holds NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #62 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #73 in Management. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The AI for Marketing specialisation delivers an AI-marketing convergence curriculum in Sem 3-4: AI for Business Decision Making, Strategic Management in the AI Era, AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation, AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection, Psychology of Leadership, and Design Thinking and Product Development as Sem 3 subjects. Sem 4 covers AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management, Fintech Innovations: Blockchain, RPA and Beyond, Predictive Financial Modelling for Business Decisions, Tech-Driven M&A and Corporate Restructuring, Emerging Tech in Business, and Research / Project.

While the core AI subject framework overlaps with the AI for Finance specialisation, the AI for Marketing spec is differentiated through a marketing-domain application lens throughout the programme. Marketing professionals apply GenAI tools to campaign automation, use predictive modelling for customer segmentation and attribution, and apply emerging tech frameworks to digital marketing transformation. The Design Thinking and Product Development module specifically targets marketing product development, and the AI governance knowledge is applied to marketing data ethics and customer data platform management.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Research Methods
sem3Subjects.description: Apply quantitative and qualitative research methods to marketing AI research, consumer insight studies, and campaign effectiveness analysis.

sem3Subjects.name: AI for Business Decision Making
sem3Subjects.description: Apply GenAI tools to marketing campaign planning, RPA to marketing operations, and AI decision frameworks to brand strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management in the AI Era
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate AI disruption in marketing industries, design AI transformation roadmaps, and develop AI-forward competitive positioning strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: AI in Corporate Finance and Valuation
sem3Subjects.description: Apply financial modelling fundamentals and AI-assisted business valuation as a marketing professional managing budget allocation and ROI analysis.

sem3Subjects.name: AI-Driven Risk Management and Fraud Detection
sem3Subjects.description: Understand AI-driven fraud prevention in digital advertising, click fraud detection, and marketing data security risk management.

sem3Subjects.name: Psychology of Leadership
sem3Subjects.description: Apply behavioural psychology and leadership science to lead marketing AI transformation teams and manage creative-technology team dynamics.

sem3Subjects.name: Design Thinking and Product Development / Business Law in the Digital Age
sem3Subjects.description: Apply design thinking to marketing product development and digital brand strategy, and navigate digital marketing law and consumer data regulations.

sem4Subjects.name: AI-Enabled Leadership and Change Management
sem4Subjects.description: Lead AI adoption in marketing teams, manage marketing technology transformation, and build AI governance for customer data platforms.

sem4Subjects.name: Fintech Innovations: Blockchain, RPA and Beyond
sem4Subjects.description: Apply blockchain loyalty programme design, RPA in marketing operations automation, and emerging payment technology to marketing strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Predictive Financial Modelling for Business Decisions
sem4Subjects.description: Build predictive models for marketing ROI forecasting, customer lifetime value modelling, and attribution analysis for budget optimisation.

sem4Subjects.name: Tech-Driven M&A and Corporate Restructuring
sem4Subjects.description: Understand marketing implications of corporate transactions, brand integration in M&A, and technology-led marketing portfolio restructuring.

sem4Subjects.name: Emerging Tech in Business
sem4Subjects.description: Apply AI, AR/VR, digital twins, and foresight frameworks to marketing innovation, customer experience design, and disruptive brand strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Research / Project (Earn While You Learn)
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied AI in marketing project on customer segmentation automation, GenAI campaign strategy, or predictive attribution modelling.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all JAIN MBA specialisations. See the main JAIN Online MBA page for core subject list.

whoHires.body:
AI for Marketing MBA graduates from JAIN Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Digital marketing agencies, E-commerce, FMCG digital marketing, EdTech growth marketing, BFSI marketing analytics, SaaS marketing

**Entry-level roles:** Digital Marketing Analyst, Growth Marketing Analyst, Marketing AI Analyst, Brand Analyst, Performance Marketing Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** AI Marketing Manager, Growth Marketing Manager, Digital Brand Manager, Marketing Technology Manager, Customer Data Platform Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CMO, Head of Digital Marketing, VP Growth, Director Marketing Technology, Chief Marketing Officer (Digital)

**Top hiring organisations:** Flipkart Marketing, Amazon India Marketing, Swiggy Growth, Zomato Marketing, Myntra Digital, HDFC Bank Digital Marketing, ICICI Bank Digital, Infosys Marketing, Publicis Groupe India, WPP India, GroupM India, Dentsu India, Ogilvy India

skills.body:
The JAIN AI for Marketing specialisation builds skills at the AI-marketing intersection that digital-forward brands and agencies seek at manager level:

**Technical skills:**
- AI for Business Decision Making: GenAI tools for marketing campaign planning, RPA marketing operations automation, and AI decision frameworks for brand strategy and customer analytics
- Predictive Financial Modelling applied to marketing: customer lifetime value prediction, marketing ROI forecasting, campaign attribution modelling, and budget allocation optimisation
- AI-Driven Risk Management: click fraud detection, digital advertising fraud prevention, and marketing data security risk management for e-commerce and D2C brands
- Emerging Tech in Business: AR/VR marketing experience design, digital twin customer simulation, and disruptive innovation frameworks for CMO-track roles

**Applied skills:**
- Design Thinking and Product Development: marketing product ideation, user-centric campaign design, and consumer insight-driven product strategy for growth marketing
- AI-Enabled Leadership: marketing team AI transformation, customer data platform governance, and marketing technology vendor management

**Soft skills:** Presenting AI-driven marketing ROI to CFO and board, managing creative agency relationships in AI-forward campaigns, communicating marketing data ethics to compliance teams, and leading omnichannel AI marketing transformation.

comparisons.body:
Comparing JAIN Online MBA AI for Marketing against peers:

**vs JAIN Marketing (standard) within the same university:** JAIN Marketing covers consumer behaviour, brand management, digital marketing, retail marketing, and B2B/B2C subjects through traditional marketing frameworks. JAIN AI for Marketing replaces traditional marketing subjects with AI-augmented approaches: GenAI campaign tools, predictive marketing modelling, and emerging tech for brand strategy. Students targeting AI-first digital marketing transformation should choose AI for Marketing. Students targeting traditional FMCG, retail marketing, or B2B marketing should choose standard Marketing.

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing:** Amity Marketing at Rs 2,25,000 covers traditional marketing management and brand strategy without dedicated AI marketing tools. JAIN AI for Marketing delivers GenAI, predictive modelling, and emerging tech for marketing that Amity's marketing track does not include. For AI-forward digital marketing and growth roles, JAIN is the more targeted option.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS carries strong Mumbai consumer brand recognition for traditional marketing careers. For AI-driven marketing technology, growth marketing, and digital transformation roles, JAIN AI for Marketing provides more forward-looking curriculum at comparable fees.

fees.body:
The JAIN Online MBA in AI for Marketing is priced between Rs 1,75,000 and Rs 1,96,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year program). JAIN offers different fee tiers based on specialisation - contact our counsellor for exact fee for this specific specialisation.

**Payment options (3 ways)**:

- **Semester-wise**: Rs 43,750 per semester (Tier 1) or Rs 49,000 per semester (Tier 2)
- **Yearly**: Rs 87,500 per year (Tier 1) or Rs 98,000 per year (Tier 2)
- **One-time upfront**: Rs 1,75,000 (Tier 1) or Rs 1,96,000 (Tier 2)

**Additional charges (Indian students)**:
- Registration fee: Rs 2,500 one-time
- Examination fee: Rs 3,000 per year (Rs 6,000 total for 2 years)

**Total effective cost (Indian student)**:
- Tier 1 specs: Rs 1,83,500
- Tier 2 specs: Rs 2,04,500

**International student fees**:
- SAARC countries: additional Rs 11,250 registration + Rs 3,750 per year exam fee
- Other international students: USD 150 registration + USD 50 per year exam fee

**EMI options**: Available through JAIN's direct NBFC lending partner tie-ups (same pattern as LPU and MUJ - not through external marketing partners). Contact our counsellor for current EMI tenure options, approval terms, and whether zero-cost or interest-bearing.

**Scholarships available** (4 categories - specific discount % and eligibility varies by admission cycle):
- **Merit-based**: Academic excellence scholarship for qualifying marks
- **Armed Forces**: Support for serving/veteran military personnel and families
- **Gender-focused**: Empowerment scholarship for diverse applicants
- **Freshers**: Transition support for recent undergraduates

Specific discount percentages are confirmed at admission based on eligibility. Contact our counsellor for current cycle scholarship details.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with JAIN each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by JAIN (Deemed-to-be University) and carries the JAIN name with the MBA designation. The AI for Marketing specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from JAIN Online MBA AI for Marketing alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Ananya Menon
items.liked: AI for Business Decision Making and Emerging Tech subjects were directly applicable to my growth marketing role at a Bengaluru startup. GenAI tools coverage was immediately usable in campaign automation.
items.disliked: Some Sem 3 subjects like AI in Corporate Finance felt more finance-oriented than marketing. Would benefit from more marketing-specific AI application examples.
items.body: I had 4 years in digital marketing and this programme positioned me for AI-forward growth marketing roles. The JAIN brand combined with the AI marketing credential was a strong differentiator in Bengaluru tech hiring.

items.name: Shreya Nambiar
items.liked: Design Thinking and Emerging Tech subjects gave strong product and innovation frameworks for marketing roles.
items.disliked: Some Sem 3 subjects share content with the AI for Finance spec. Marketing-specific AI case studies would make the specialisation more distinct.
items.body: Good AI marketing programme for South India digital careers. Kerala and Bengaluru digital marketing companies recognised the JAIN credential. Supplement with Google and Meta digital marketing certifications for maximum career impact.

items.name: Vikram Chandrasekhar
items.liked: Predictive Financial Modelling for marketing ROI forecasting was directly applicable to my campaign planning work.
items.disliked: The overlap with AI for Finance in Sem 3-4 subjects is notable. Students expecting a deeply differentiated marketing AI curriculum should review the syllabus carefully before enrolling.
items.body: Reasonable credential for AI-oriented marketing management roles. For traditional FMCG or brand marketing without an AI technology focus, JAIN's standard Marketing specialisation or Amity MBA Marketing would be more appropriate.

faqs.question: How are JAIN fees different for different specializations?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers two pricing tiers across its MBA specialisations. Tier 1 is Rs 1,75,000 total (plus Rs 2,500 registration and Rs 6,000 examination fees). Tier 2 is Rs 1,96,000 total (same additional charges). The tier applicable to the AI for Marketing specialisation should be confirmed with our counsellor as tier assignment can change across admission cycles.

faqs.question: What scholarships does JAIN offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: JAIN offers 4 scholarship categories: Merit-based (academic excellence), Armed Forces (military personnel and families), Gender-focused (diversity empowerment), and Freshers (recent graduates). Specific discount percentages and eligibility conditions are confirmed at admission and vary by intake cycle. Contact our counsellor for current cycle details.

faqs.question: Does JAIN offer dual specialization in Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. For marketing-analytics focused students, JAIN offers Marketing and Business Analytics (dual) and Marketing and HRM (dual). These dual specs combine marketing domain depth with analytics or HR subjects in a single MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the difference between JAIN AI for Marketing and JAIN Marketing?
faqs.answer: JAIN Marketing covers consumer behaviour, brand management, digital marketing, B2B marketing, retail, and international marketing through traditional marketing frameworks. JAIN AI for Marketing covers AI-augmented marketing: GenAI campaign tools, AI-enabled leadership, predictive marketing modelling, and emerging tech for brand strategy. Students targeting AI transformation in marketing should choose AI for Marketing.

faqs.question: Does JAIN AI for Marketing prepare students for growth marketing roles?
faqs.answer: Yes. AI for Business Decision Making, Predictive Financial Modelling applied to marketing ROI, and Emerging Tech in Business directly support growth marketing, performance marketing, and marketing technology roles. JAIN's Bengaluru base gives access to South India's large e-commerce and SaaS marketing hiring market where these skills are in demand.

chooseIf: You are a marketing professional targeting AI-first digital marketing transformation, growth marketing, or marketing technology roles.
You want GenAI tools for campaigns, predictive marketing modelling, and emerging tech for brand strategy in one MBA programme.
You want 3 flexible payment options and 4 scholarship categories at fees of Rs 1.75L-1.96L.
consider: If traditional FMCG brand management, B2B marketing, or consumer marketing without AI focus is the target, JAIN's standard Marketing specialisation provides more domain depth.
If marketing plus analytics depth is the goal, JAIN's Marketing and Business Analytics dual specialisation combines marketing with dedicated analytics subjects.
If pan-India consumer brand recognition is the priority, Amity Online MBA Marketing at Rs 2.25L or NMIMS Marketing offer stronger national recognition.
